stories.headline: Ukrainian drones strike St Petersburg oil terminal and Kronstadt naval base ahead of economic forum

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Candace Owens on Ukraine funding by the U.S: Americans are really getting tired of funding — not knowing where money is going, learning that oligarchs are buying yachts.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Ukraine just droned a Russian warship inside a dry dock in Kronstadt. Kronstadt. As in 30km from Saint Petersburg. As in deep inside Russia. The radar collapsed onto the superstructure. The mast fell over. The ship is cooked.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Gasoline crisis in 20 Russian regions, including Moscow & St. Petersburg—no fuel! 🚫⛽ Russians might need horses and donkeys soon 🐴 Ukrainian drones hit refineries. Millions are now against the war. Putin hides—his collapse is coming.

stories.headline: Senate Republicans greenlight dropping IRS investigations into Trump

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: At 4am, Senate Republicans gave the greenlight for the IRS to drop ALL investigations into Trump and his family. That means if Trump is evading taxes, we’ll never know. I have a bill to make this illegal. And I won’t stop fighting to get it done.

stories.headline: White House launches DOJ Model Cities Initiative to slash violent crime

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: President Donald J. Trump announces the next step in the administration’s successful war on crime: the Department of Justice’s Model Cities Initiative, designed to slash violent crime and RESTORE LAW AND ORDER in major cities across America. 🇺🇸

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Trump is sleeping again

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: 🚨TRUMP CAN’T LIFT HIS ARM? HOLY SHIT: Trump’s voice sounds unusually weak, he appears to be slurring some of his words, and he barely raises his right arm throughout the clip.

stories.headline: Trump falls asleep during Oval Office announcement

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: OMG 🚨 KAITLIN COLLINS FALLS ASLEEP IN OVAL OFFICE DURING PRESIDENT TRUMP PRESS CONFERENCE. SHE IS NOT WELL. WHAT IS GOING ON?

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Trump appears to be completely passed out asleep during his 3pm Oval Office announcement

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Donald Trump fell asleep multiple times in the Oval Office today. AGAIN. That’s why I’ve called for the 25th Amendment, and dozens of my colleagues have done the same. Donald Trump is unwell and must be removed from office. It’s a national security crisis.

stories.headline: SpaceX IPO sees orders exceed available shares
stories.body: SpaceX has already received orders for more than the shares available in its record-setting $75 billion initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, shortly after starting to formally market the deal. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-06-05/spacex-s-75-billion-ipo-draws-more-orders-than-shares-available?taid=6a22e431eb9d5100012d92a0&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=business&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: Wuthering Waves announces Cyberpunk: Edgerunners collaboration details
stories.body:
Wuthering Waves × Cyberpunk: Edgerunners — Special Talk

Ahead of the launch of our collaboration with Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, we invite you to join us for a special talk featuring Bartosz Sztybor, VP of Franchise at CD PROJEKT RED & writer for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, and Milena Zając, writer & editor at CD PROJEKT RED. Together, we will share behind-the-scenes stories of our collaboration, explore cyberpunk themes, and discuss how our dev team brought the world of Edgerunners to life in-game.

Wuthering Waves × Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration is set to launch on June 8th (UTC+8).
The new 5-Star Resonators Lucy and Rebecca will debut, and you can snag the 5-Star Resonator Rebecca for free!

#WutheringWaves
#Edgerunners

stories.headline: Anthropic urges global pause in AI development over self-improvement risks
stories.body: Anthropic is calling for top AI labs to weigh slowing the pace of development, suggesting that AI systems are advancing so rapidly that they may soon be able to improve themselves without human intervention in ways that could pose societal risks. https://www.wsj.com/tech/ai/anthropic-urges-global-pause-in-ai-development-flags-self-improvement-risk-99cefb73?mod=e2tw

stories.headline: Explanation of slang terms involving "cooked".
stories.body: Jfyi, "cooked" benchmarks means that they are benchmaxxed. Accountants "cook" books to dodge taxes. "Absolutely cooking" benchmarks means they are great as in "now we're cooking with gas" etc. "Absolutely cooked" also means that something is done for, meaning all hope is lost.

stories.headline: Iran pushes conspiracy theory that Israel is merging with US military
stories.body:
“Israel is merging with the U.S. military” That’s what the Islamic republic is pushing into the U.S. media narrative. 

The myth was invented by the Quincy Institute, founded by Trita Parsi — who himself has long been accused of working with the Islamic regime. 

The goal of the smear campaign isn’t to inform. It’s to manufacture paranoia and convince Americans that Israel secretly controls their government. The conspiracy theory is the point, and it’s straight from the playbook of the regime. 

@JNS_org
